reason: The step ||P-Phi||=||S(R-I)/2|| <= ||S|| ||R-I||/2 uses submultiplicativity ||S(R-I)|| <= ||S||*||R-I|| of the order-unit-norm-induced operator norm on End(B(H)_sa). PROJECT RULE: no standard facts. No refs/ source establishes that End(B(H)_sa) with this operator norm is a submultiplicative Banach algebra. HOS 1.3.2 (refs/hos/joa-m.md:458) defines a Banach algebra (||xy||<=||x|| ||y||) abstractly but never instantiates it for the endomorphism algebra of an order-unit space. Kitaev (refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:354-357,2171-2182,~520) derives the corresponding estimates in the cb-norm Banach algebra of completely bounded maps, NOT in the operator/order-unit norm; GT-kitaev-spectral itself flags the adaptation but cites no source for submultiplicativity in the new norm. Load-bearing unprovenanced fact.
